title: Smooth Scroll + Skeleton Loaders
description: Added smooth scroll with reduced-motion override, skeleton loader CSS with shimmer animation (.skeleton, .skeleton-text, .skeleton-card, .skeleton-row, .skeleton-avatar), removeSkeletons() JS function. Supersedes TKT-250 smooth scroll scope.

florentino_gate.reason: UX overhaul is critical path for product quality. Approved per TKT-159 audit findings.
